items.name: Anamoly-Detection
items.description: Developed an anomaly detection framework using machine learning (Isolation Forest, One-Class SVM,  Local Outlier Factor) to reduce false positives in cybersecurity.

items.name: Supervised_ML_Studio
items.description: This repository contains supervised machine learning end to end model deployment steps through UI using streamlit framework

items.name: RakshAI
items.description: A machine learning–based system for detecting deepfake and synthetic audio using signal processing and neural network techniques. This repository contains an AI-driven framework for deepfake audio detection, leveraging acoustic features and deep learning models to identify synthetic and manipulated speech.

items.name: software-cost-estimation-framework
items.description: Hybrid ensemble machine learning and deep learning framework for accurate and explainable software cost estimation.

items.name: CanineGenomicsResearch
items.description: An Integrated Network and Machine Learning Framework for Prioritizing Canine Disease Genes: A Comparative Mammalian Genomics Perspective

items.name: codestresser
items.description: CodeStresser is a ML-driven static analysis framework that scans source code in multiple programming languages to detect security vulnerabilities. It extracts per-vulnerability features and uses machine learning models to predict severity and confidence, generating a structured, developer-friendly security report.

items.name: intelligent-test-selection-ml
items.description: Machine Learning–based intelligent test selection framework for CI/CD pipelines. Uses commit history, test execution data, and ML models to predict and run only relevant tests to accelerate regression cycles.

items.name: AI-Driven-Enterprise-Sales-Gross-Profit-Forecasting-Engine-2026-
items.description: A Machine Learning framework using CatBoost to forecast branch × product level sales and margin outcomes. Includes scenario simulation, CFO-grade financial logic (Sales → GP% → GP → COGS), enterprise dataset modeling, and AI-driven strategic planning for retail and distribution networks.

items.name: flaky-test-prediction-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for detecting flaky tests and improving CI/CD pipeline reliability.

items.name: ModelsFromScratch
items.description: This is a set of simple machine learning model implementations to deepen my understanding of the mathematics and how frameworks would implement these.

items.name: Probabilistic-bitcoin-with-ML-
items.description: A Python-based framework designed to quantify risk in Bitcoin trading using Probabilistic Machine Learning. Most ML models fail in crypto because they ignore oratorical uncertainty (the inherent randomness of the market). This repo provides tools to build models that don't just predict the next move

items.name: Edge-Continual-Learning-for-Machine-Signal-Monitoring
items.description: Edge-Cloud Continual Learning is a hybrid TinyML framework that allows embedded devices to detect unknown machine signals and trigger cloud-based retraining. By using Replay Memory and Exemplar Datasets, the system evolves to recognize new machine types over time without losing its ability to monitor previous ones.

items.name: AP
items.description: Real-time adaptive infrastructure adjusts load balancing and auto-scaling via machine learning-driven decision-making, delivering intelligent distributed systems framework.

items.name: An-interpretable-spatial-machine-learning-modeling-framework
items.description: This repository contains the relevant code and information for constructing the interpretable spatial machine learning modeling framework.

items.name: Physics-Guided-Machine-Learning-for-Accurate-GSM-Prediction-in-Single-Jersey-Knit-Fabric
items.description: Physics-guided machine learning framework for predicting fabric GSM in Single Jersey knit fabrics. Evaluates 22 regression models with feature engineering (tightness factor), hyperparameter tuning, and explainable AI (SHAP, LIME). Extra Trees achieved best performance with RMSE ≈ 4.1 and R² ≈ 0.95 for accurate textile manufacturing prediction.

items.name: AutoML-SHAP-Analysis-Notebooks
items.description: Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) framework featuring comprehensive model interpretability using SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations). This repository showcases the end-to-end process of automated feature engineering, hyperparameter optimization, and the use of game-theory-based explanations to visualize global and local feature importance.

items.name: GAN-Enhanced-Phishing-Detection
items.description: A phishing detection framework that utilizes machine learning, adversarial training, and multi-modal feature extraction. It analyzes various data sources, including URLs, HTML, metadata, and user behavior, while leveraging GAN-generated samples to protect against adversarial attacks.

items.name: AIX
items.description: A lean Torch like C++ machine learning framework with multiple device acceleration support.

items.name: LEMONsc
items.description: Framework for  mass estimation of massive objects in astrophysical collision-driven systems using machine learning models

items.name: Drift-Aware-XAI-Fairness-Governance-Framework-XFGF
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning governance framework (Master's Thesis) designed to monitor the intersection of data drift, Explainable AI (SHAP/LIME), and algorithmic fairness over time in financial risk models.

items.name: Multitask-learning
items.description: A joint modeling framework of Multi-Task Learning (MTL) and machine learning for limited sample data is proposed. This method integrates a hybrid neural network model that combines a Multilayer Perceptron and Convolutional Neural Network. It incorporates a cross-stitch structure, MTL, and homoscedastic uncertainty loss weighting mechanism.

items.name: Aegis
